LanguageData.LC_ContainmentStrength.label: LC containment strength
LanguageData.LC_ContainmentStrength.description: How securely this platform can contain an abnormality. Strong walls and doors, lighting, roofing and LC containment flooring improve this value.
LanguageData.LC_MinimumContainmentStrength.label: minimum LC containment strength
LanguageData.LC_MinimumContainmentStrength.descriptio: The LC containment strength required to safely hold this abnormality.
